name: gitempire
description: Mahabharata warriors as recursive AI agents — GitAgent Hackathon 2026

scripts.validate: gitagent validate . && gitagent validate agents/bhima && gitagent validate agents/karna && gitagent validate agents/drona && gitagent validate agents/ashwathama && gitagent validate agents/abhimanyu
scripts.validate:all: for d in . agents/bhima agents/karna agents/drona agents/ashwathama agents/abhimanyu; do echo "--- $d ---" && gitagent validate $d; done

author: charan-s108
